inputs.label: Air Flow Rate
inputs.businessContext: The volumetric flow rate of air processed by the DAC system per hour.

inputs.label: CO₂ Concentration
inputs.businessContext: The atmospheric CO₂ concentration at the intake, typically around 415 ppm.

inputs.label: Capture Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: The percentage of CO₂ removed from the processed air stream.

inputs.label: Operating Hours per Year
inputs.businessContext: The total number of hours the DAC plant operates annually.

inputs.label: Energy Consumption per Ton CO₂
inputs.businessContext: The electrical energy required to capture one metric ton of CO₂.

inputs.label: Electricity Price
inputs.businessContext: The cost of electricity per kilowatt-hour.

formulas.annualElectricityCost: airFlow * co2Concentration * captureEfficiency * operatingHours * 1.964e-11 * energyPerTon * electricityPrice
